# Open Door Media

> Open Door Media is a mission-first media agency based in Wichita, KS. We provide website design, video production, and digital marketing for churches, nonprofits, and purpose-driven organizations — nationwide. Founded and led by Lucas Hafer, Creative Director. Sliding-scale pricing available for eligible nonprofits.

## About
- [About Open Door Media](https://opendoormedia.us/about.html): Who we are, who we serve, and what drives us. We partner with organizations already making the world better — our job is to help more people find them, trust them, and join their mission.

## Services
- [All Services](https://opendoormedia.us/services/): Overview of our full service offering — web design, video, digital marketing, branding, SEO, and Google Business Profile optimization.
- [Website Design](https://opendoormedia.us/services/website-design.html): Custom website design starting at $3,000, sliding scale for nonprofits. Includes copywriting, SEO, Google Business Profile setup, and mobile-responsive builds on Webflow, Squarespace, Wix, or custom development.
- [Video Production](https://opendoormedia.us/services/video-production.html): Story-first video and audio production starting at $1,500. Testimonials, explainers, event coverage, sermon media, podcasts, and radio spots. All production handled in-house.
- [Digital Marketing](https://opendoormedia.us/services/digital-marketing.html): Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook and Instagram), and Google Ad Grant management starting at $1,500/month. Eligible nonprofits can receive up to $10,000/month in free Google search ad spend through the Google Ad Grant program.

## Contact
- [Start a Project](https://opendoormedia.us/contact.html): Project inquiry form. Phone: +1 316-285-0517. Email: connect@opendoormedia.us. Location: Wichita, KS. Serving clients nationwide.
- [Share Your Story](https://opendoormedia.us/share-your-story/): Submit a personal story for The Open Door, our original storytelling project.

## The Open Door (Original Content)
- [The Open Door](https://opendoormedia.us/the-open-door/): Original storytelling project documenting what God is doing in people's lives, giving voice to overlooked experiences.
- [Stories](https://opendoormedia.us/the-open-door/stories.html): Published story archive.

## Key Facts
- Founded by Lucas Hafer, Creative Director, based in Wichita, KS
- Serves clients nationwide with remote services and regional production support throughout the Midwest
- Primary clients: churches and ministries, nonprofits, healthcare and direct primary care, mental health organizations, anti-trafficking organizations, family farms, homeschool communities, artists, and purpose-driven small businesses
- Google Ad Grant certified — eligible 501(c)(3) nonprofits may qualify for up to $10,000/month in free Google Ads
- Mission: help purpose-driven organizations reach more people through professional media and marketing
- Pricing model: fair market rates with sliding scale available for qualifying nonprofits
- Partners include the Kansas Aviation Museum, the DeBoer Foundation, Commoncare, and Temple Baptist Church
